description.value:
Disease: Demon Fever — Severity: [Deadly] — Stage 1

Effects: Disoriented condition. Intelligence and Wisdom checks: add 1 to both die results. The character's eyes occasionally flicker with unnatural light.

Recovery: [[/save type=fortitude]] at end of each long rest (Hard task — 2 successes cures; 1 success = no change; 0 = worsen). Magical healing alone suppresses symptoms for 24 hours but does not cure; Major Restoration cures completely.

system.vector: Daemon claws or bites, nexus-adjacent contamination, exposure to corrupted pneuma

activeEffects.notes: Intelligence checks: add 1 to die results
Wisdom checks: add 1 to die results

recovery.chatMessage: Make a [[/save type=fortitude]] to recover from Demon Fever (Stage 1).
